# BharatPe changes

Tasks: BharatPe - App download, Icon, Email and DOB optional (https://app.notion.com/p/BharatPe-App-download-Icon-Email-and-DOB-optional-1f1cc3023f9d4f50afe786b445903a7c?pvs=21)

# **What problem are we solving?**

For our B2B partner BharatPe we are making a few changes to make the post loan application journey for the user as smooth as possible.

---

# **How do we measure success?**

---

# **How are others solving this problem?**

---

# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements overview (optional)

## User stories / User flow

## Requirements

Related to DOB field in customer creation API.

1. DOB should be an optional field in customer creation API
2. If partner doesn’t send DOB, DOB capture screen should be triggered once the user clicks on the check eligibility page. On this screen PAN will be pre-filled. 
3. If partner sends DOB, DOB capture screens should not be triggered. 

Related to Email ID field in customer creation API.

1. Email ID should be an optional field in customer creation API
2. If partner doesn’t send email ID, email capture screens should be triggered once the user clicks on the check eligibility page.  
3. If partner sends email ID, email capture screens should not be triggered.
4. In case partner doesn’t send DOB as well, DOB capture screen should be triggered before triggering the email capturing screens.

Related to landing page changes.

- When the user completes the loan application journey, the user should land on a success page that prompts user to download Volt Money’s app. This should only be done for B2B partners which only support loan application on their platform. This screen will sta
    - Such user should not land on the current landing page evr
    - Such user should not see the existing success screen shown to the tata users

---
